```{=html}
<style>
  body {
    font-family: sans-serif;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }
  .areas-of-interest {
    text-align: center;
    margin: 0 auto;
    width: 110%;
    padding: 20px;
  }
  .areas-of-interest h1 {
    font-size: 2em;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    text-algin: center;
  }
  .areas-of-interest p {
    font-size: 1em;
    font-style: cursive;
    line-height: 1.5;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    text-align: center;
  }
  .colu {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: 20px;
    justify-items: center;
  }
  .colus {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: flex-start;
    padding: 10px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 5px;
  }
  .colu h3 {
    font-size: 1.5em;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .colu {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
  }
  @media (max-width: 600px) {
    .colu {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }
</style>
```

```{=html}
</head>
<body>
  <section class="areas-of-interest">
    <h2>Areas of Interest</h2>
    <div class="colu">
    <div class="colus">
        <h3>Data Science</h3>
        <p>I love analytical thinking and data-driven decision making, using data and programming tools to answer questions. I also regularly post about Data Science and Statistics on LinkedIn.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Machine Learning</h3>
        <p> When physical based modelling is not an option, my last go to is Machine Learning. I have strong grasp of both theoritical and conceptual understanding behind ML</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Cloud Computing</h3>
        <p>I am self-taught in Big Data, including Hadoop, PySpark, BDMS, and RDBMS. Additionally, I hold certifications in data warehouse platforms like Snowflake.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>NLP</h3>
        <p>I have worked with several news article data to measure the sentiments of newspapers over timeseries, and also ML modelling with Text data in R.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Applied Statistics</h3>
        <p>I frequently extract data from open source platforms, run simulation experiments, and calculate model output uncertainties using statistics.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="colus">
        <h3>Data Visualization</h3>
        <p>I excel in data visualization with ggplot in R, ensuring scientific aesthetics, correct color contrasts, and plots that answer specific questions.</p>
      </div>
      
    </div>
  </section>
  
```
